rows.label: tev031501_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire

rows.label: tev031501_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Chiopittas about the Ma-non.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev031501_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss

rows.label: tev031501_SEL0021
rows.name:
Ask Chiopittas if anything
is troubling him.

rows.label: tev031501_SEL1021
rows.name: Ask Chiopittas about recent events.

rows.label: tev031501_SEL1031
rows.name:
Ask Chiopittas what he
did during the attack.

rows.label: tev031501_SEL0051
rows.name: Ask Chiopittas about the Nopon.

rows.label: tev031501_SEL2021
rows.name: Ask Chiopittas about recent events.

rows.label: tev031501_MSG0001
rows.name:
Ma-non are generally positive thinkers, but
even we felt our hearts racing as the Growth
surrounded us in Valley of Oblivion, you know?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev031501_MSG0002
rows.name:
Thanks to that, I was able to directly experience
the emotion of "despair," which isn't something
I really have a lot of experience with.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev031501_MSG0003
rows.name:
I should very much like to experience it
again without the attendant threat to life
and limb, if such a thing is possible?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev031501_MSG0008
rows.name:
Excuse me, but I would like to observe the full
range of human facial expression. Would you mind
getting angry for 20 seconds, then happy for 10?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev031501_MSG0009
rows.name:
Er, you seem a bit...perplexed
by my request?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev031501_MSG0010
rows.name:
How...interesting? I've been going
about asking this favor of every
human that I meet, and yet...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev031501_MSG0011
rows.name:
Well, they all seem to react with
the same anomalous facial expression
as as you have right now.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev031501_MSG0012
rows.name:
Why do you refuse to cooperate? One would think our
friendship treaty provides the perfect opportunity
for our races to understand each other, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev031501_MSG1001
rows.name:
The tremendous energy that Dana is
emitting is called "love," isn't it?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev031501_MSG1002
rows.name:
If all of humanity discharged this
energy at once, I think perhaps you
might be able to conquer any foe?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev031501_MSG1003
rows.name:
Maybe if I understand you better I can
also become loving and all-powerful?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev031501_MSG1008
rows.name:
Initially, I was determined to measure
and quantify these human emotions you
call "fear" and "despair," but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev031501_MSG1009
rows.name:
But I ended up stopping the scanning
halfway through, even though I
love measuring things, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev031501_MSG1010
rows.name:
Can you imagine seeing the ghastly transformation
of a peaceful city into a horrific battlefield
strewn with the unlucky fallen?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev031501_MSG1011
rows.name:
Well, let's just leave it at my saying that
I have no wish to witness or measure any
such carnage again, if that's all right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev031501_MSG1015
rows.name:
Now that I have amassed an impressive
collection of emotive data for humans, I
thought I might try my hand at the Nopon next?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev031501_MSG1016
rows.name:
But when I pointed my scanner at the first
of them, a strange reading appeared on my
screen. And do you know what it said?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev031501_MSG1017
rows.name:
"Unlock my feelings now
for just 156 credits!"[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev031501_MSG1018
rows.name:
I don't know what kind of emotion is powerful
enough to reprogram my scanner, but it was
both compelling and absolutely...terrifying?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev031501_MSG2001
rows.name:
Do you suppose I can negate
Dana's "sadness" by giving her
a watch like you did Pollen?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev031501_MSG2002
rows.name:
...I see. So there is no cure for this "broken
heart" sickness you speak of? I fear I'll never be
able to measure the true diameter of love, will I?[ST:wait ]
